claim_boundary: Phase 3 runway registration only. No live ingestion, content validation, alerting, production monitoring, autonomous action, or truth resolution claimed.
phase2_boundary: Phase 2 validated repo-side registry/tracking artifacts only. It did not validate live ingestion, production monitoring, content truth, alert readiness, or autonomous action.
phase3_goal: Validate bounded live-sample collection, parse normalization, provenance retention, failure handling, and claim-safety gates in small batches.
purpose: Move from Phase 2 registry/tracking closure to bounded live-ingestion readiness without overstating production capability.
required_gates: Gate 1: select low-risk public endpoints only
Gate 2: fetch bounded samples with rate limits and user-agent
Gate 3: store raw sample metadata and parsed record separately
Gate 4: preserve original language and translated/derived fields separately
Gate 6: no alerts or high-stakes conclusions without human review
Gate 7: blocked or unstable endpoints remain honestly blocked
